more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: No eternal posts in Zanu PF: Mudenda
more.description: Source: No eternal posts in Zanu PF: Mudenda – The Standard Zanu PF secretary-general Jacob Mudenda reminded party members that no leadership position is eternal, including the presidency, and must never be treated as private property. He warned party members against personalising leadership positions, reminding them that offices outlive individuals. more.title: Buhera South MP violence case deferred
more.description: Source: Buhera South MP violence case deferred – The Standard The public violence case involving Buhera South Member of Parliament Ngonidzashe Mudekunye has been deferred to March 13 after the State applied for a postponement, citing an incomplete docket. Mudekunye appeared before Chimanimani magistrate Regis Mawarire last Tuesday. Prosecutor Hardlife Machando told the court that the matter was not ready for trial as [...]The post Buhera South MP violence case deferred appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation.

more.title: Scottland run through Dynamos
more.description: Scottland produced a stunning performance to smash Dynamos 5-0 in the Castle Challenge Cup on Sunday. The defending Zimbabwe Castle Lager Premier Soccer League champions provided a masterclass in decapitation, with their goals coming from five different players.
